Scenario.title: Unitronics Defacement Campaign in Healthcare Sector
Scenario.overview: Healthcare and Public Health Simple This scenario depicts a targeted spearphishing campaign compromising healthcare organizations through internet-facing assets, leading to data manipulation and operational disruption.
Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets, Script File, OS Process
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: Delivery Method, Command and Scripting Interpreter, Data Manipulation

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.kev: CVE-2018-19943 (CWE-79): A cross-site scripting vulnerability affecting QNAP NAS File Station could allow remote attackers to inject malicious code.
stage.description: The attacker sends targeted phishing emails containing malicious hyperlinks to healthcare staff, exploiting vulnerable internet-facing assets. The link leverages a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability (CVE-2018-19943) to deliver a payload, bypassing authentication mechanisms through social engineering.

stage.name: Execution
stage.kev: CVE-2022-40139 (CWE-200): Trend Micro Apex One contains an improper validation of rollback mechanism components that could lead to remote code execution.
stage.description: After initial access, the attacker executes malicious scripts on compromised systems, exploiting a remote code execution (RCE) flaw (CVE-2022-40139) in Trend Micro software. The script-based API exploitation allows the attacker to run arbitrary commands, escalating privileges and establishing persistence.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attacker manipulates critical OS processes to alter patient records and public health data, leveraging poor input validation (CAPEC-153). This disrupts medical operations and spreads misinformation, achieving strategic objectives through data integrity violations.

Scenario.summary: A sophisticated spearphishing campaign targets healthcare providers, exploiting internet-facing vulnerabilities to execute malicious scripts and manipulate sensitive data, causing operational disruption and reputational damage.
